headline: Price Prediction: Synopsys Will Trade at This Price in 2027
summary: Synopsys (NASDAQ:SNPS) runs the software that designs the world’s most advanced chips. With AI workloads exploding and the $35 billion Ansys acquisition now fully integrated, this is arguably the most strategically positioned EDA franchise on the market. Yet shares of Synopsys are up just 2.32% year to date, trading at $480.64. So can SNPS hit ... Price Prediction: Synopsys Will Trade at This Price in 2027

headline: Synopsys Samsung AI Chip Design Tie Up Tests Valuation And Growth
summary: Synopsys and Samsung Foundry expanded their collaboration, introducing AI-powered design and test technologies. The new flows are validated on Samsung's advanced 2nm process nodes and include production-ready EDA and multiphysics analysis. The partnership also broadens the IP portfolio for both cutting edge and automotive chip applications. For investors watching NasdaqGS:SNPS, this deeper tie-up with Samsung Foundry highlights Synopsys's role at the core of advanced chip design tools. The...

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Synopsys (SNPS) After Recent Valuation Concerns?
summary: Wondering if Synopsys at around US$480.64 is still a solid opportunity or if the easy gains are behind it? This article focuses squarely on what that price could mean for value. The stock has been fairly steady recently, with the share price down 4.6% over the last week and 0.7% over the last month, while the 1 year return sits at 5.6% and the 5 year return at 91.8%. Recent headlines around Synopsys have continued to keep attention on the company, reflecting its role in semiconductor design...
